title: pyrethrum tatsienense var. tanacetopsis
intro: Pyrethrum tatsienense var. tanacetopsis, also known as the Chinese pyrethrum, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of China. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum tatsienense var. tanacetopsis include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions.
